name: No-Bake Peanut Butter Treats
recipeInstructions:
2 cups (mixture of) raisins, dried mixed fruit, miniature marshmallows, Flaked coconut, chopped peanuts, semisweet chocolate pieces
Mix together peanut butter, powdered sugar, milk and vanilla. Stir in oats.
Blend well. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper. Let set up 1 hour.
Store in tightly covered container.
